title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 260.371 - Severability clause, exceptions
text:
260.371.  Severability clause, exceptions. — The provisions of this act* are severable, except as otherwise provided in sections 260.225 and 260.370.  If any provision of this act* is found by a court of competent jurisdiction to be invalid or unconstitutional, the remaining provisions of this act shall remain in full force and effect.
(L. 1988 S.B. 535 § 3) 
Effective 5-03-88 
*"This act" (S.B. 535, 1988) contained numerous sections. Consult Disposition of Sections table for a definitive listing.
